headlines.title: Watch: Wes Streeting leaves No 10 - minutes after arrival
headlines.description: Health Secretary Wes Streeting leaves No 10 less than 20 minutes after arriving for a meeting with the prime minister.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: Why a quick meeting is overshadowing the King's Speech
headlines.description: The King will set out the government's agenda in Parliament, but the political plotting continues.

headlines.title: The potential challengers to Keir Starmer
headlines.description: Andy Burnham, Angela Rayner and Wes Streeting are all potential candidates for the top job.

headlines.title: Starmer must go before next election, say Labour-backing unions
headlines.description: Sir Keir Starmer has vowed to get on with governing despite pressure from his MPs and cabinet splits.

headlines.title: A decade on, Trump returns to a stronger and more assertive China
headlines.description: Beijing is arguably the most powerful competitor the US has confronted in its history, one analyst says.

headlines.title: Alex's mum abducted him as a boy. Now he's ready to talk to her again
headlines.description: Alex Batty reveals all about his abduction and life on the run in a new BBC documentary.

headlines.title: Israel qualifies but Boy George is out of Eurovision
headlines.description: The Israeli act is met with boos and chants, but also a chorus of support, at Tuesday's semi-final.

headlines.title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
headlines.description: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

headlines.title: Twenty-two people set to leave hospital after hantavirus isolation
headlines.description: The passengers and crew will have spent 72-hours isolating at Arrowe Park Hospital in Merseyside.

headlines.title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
headlines.description: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

headlines.title: Why is there a row about an MSP's immigration status?
headlines.description: Q Manivannan, originally from India, is on a student visa which is due to expire at the end of the year.

headlines.title: 'Prize draw addiction left me hungry and using tissues for tampons'
headlines.description: The lure of luxury prizes is leading people to addiction, gambling support organisations warn.

headlines.title: Air India crisis deepens ahead of final Ahmedabad crash report
headlines.description: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.

headlines.title: 'Our homes are two minutes from each other but a peace wall makes it 20 minutes'
headlines.description: Living on opposite sides of a so-called peaceline, they have had to overcome a psychological as well as a physical barrier.

headlines.title: Man, 26, dies after car hit group of pedestrians
headlines.description: Police say a murder investigation is under way after Tyler Fairman died in hospital.

headlines.title: World's first international football stadium given protected status
headlines.description: The first Hampden Park is designated a scheduled monument in recognition of its place in football history.

headlines.title: 'Ciao Kate': Crowds gathering for Catherine's comeback tour to Italy
headlines.description: The Princess of Wales travels to Reggio Emilia, to learn about its approach to early years education.

headlines.title: Spring temperatures to bounce back next week after cold snap
headlines.description: A flip from northerly to southerly winds will bring warmer weather across the UK next week but as Ben Rich explains that does not necessarily mean sunshine.

headlines.title: Jason Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies aged 47
headlines.description: Collins shared late last year that he had been diagnosed with an aggressive form of brain cancer.

headlines.title: White-tailed eagles to be released in Exmoor despite farmer warnings
headlines.description: Some farmers fear the reintroduction of the UK's biggest bird of prey will threaten their livestock.

headlines.title: Alleged scammer extradited after  hacking attempt on BTS star Jungkook
headlines.description: The suspect allegedly tried to transfer millions of dollars worth of shares from the K-pop singer's account.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Starmer Says He’s Staying
headlines.description: Starmer vows to fight on despite another day of pressure from his party to quit.

headlines.title: Trump takes his revenge on disloyal Republicans
headlines.description: The US president targets his political enemies in Kentucky and Indiana

headlines.title: Will Middlesbrough-Southampton play-off have a decisive third act?
headlines.description: Despite a 2-1 win for Southampton, allegations of spying means the outcome of their play-off with Middlesbrough is still not decided.

headlines.title: NBA player Clarke dies aged 29
headlines.description: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke dies at the age of 29, the NBA team confirms.

headlines.title: Ted Lasso actor Fernandez signs for US club
headlines.description: Ted Lasso actor Cristo Fernandez signs for American second-tier side El Paso Locomotive after a two-month trial.

headlines.title: Liverpool owners face dilemma - stick or twist with Slot?
headlines.description: Liverpool owners FSG face a dilemma as they consider whether to react to growing fan dissent against Arne Slot, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

headlines.title: Immortality beckons - but Hearts must overcome Celtic & weight of history
headlines.description: For Heart of Midlothian, the tantalising, scarcely-believable, bottom line is this: after 66 years they may be crowned champions of Scotland on Wednesday.

headlines.title: How Gerrard went from 'best night' to 'head like a box of frogs'
headlines.description: Steven Gerrard inspired Liverpool's Champions League win in 2005 but just two months later wanted out. What happened?

headlines.title: Raducanu to make return with wildcard in Strasbourg
headlines.description: Emma Raducanu will make her return to action in Strasbourg after being granted a wildcard, as she seeks crucial match practice before the French Open.
